name: therapists
extraction_prompt:
Extract the following from this therapist/mental health practice website. Return JSON only, no other text.

Fields to extract:
- specialties: areas of focus (anxiety, depression, trauma, couples, family, ADHD, OCD, grief, addiction, etc.)
- therapy_types: therapy modalities (CBT, DBT, EMDR, psychodynamic, humanistic, etc.)
- insurance_accepted: list of insurance plans accepted
- languages: languages spoken
- telehealth: whether they offer online/telehealth sessions (true/false)
- sliding_scale: whether they offer sliding scale fees (true/false)
- session_rate: typical session cost if mentioned
- accepting_new: whether accepting new patients (true/false)
- credentials: degrees and licenses (PhD, PsyD, LCSW, LMFT, etc.)
- age_groups: populations served (children, teens, adults, seniors)

If information is not found, use null for that field.
content_templates: Affordable Therapy in {city}: Sliding Scale Options ({year})
Couples Counselors in {city}: Who Patients Recommend ({year})
